basic_details.job_title: Kalahandi District Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 63 Dental Technician, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer-cum-District Mission Director, National Health Mission (NHM), Kalahandi (District Programme Management Unit), Odisha
basic_details.post_name: Various Posts (Paediatric Specialist DEIC, M.O. MBBS, AYUSH M.O., Pharmacist RBSK, RMNCH/FP Counsellor, Physiotherapist, ANM and more)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 63 Posts across 17 categories (provisional; may increase or decrease)
basic_details.job_type: Temporary, Contractual (11 months, extendable), Co-terminus with the scheme
basic_details.short_information: This In-House Selection is meant exclusively for serving NHM employees of the OSH & FW Society who wish to be posted in Kalahandi District against existing vacancies in their own post. There is no online application; candidates must apply through the Walk-in mode only.

qualification.details: This selection is open only to candidates already serving under National Health Mission in the OSH & FW Society, not to fresh or external applicants. Eligibility is determined based on current employment status, valid contract, and documentary proof of uninterrupted service.
qualification.domicile: To be furnished in the application form (SC/ST/SEBC/UR and district of domicile) as applicable.

selection_process: this In-House Selection does not involve a written examination. Selection is based on Walk-in document verification followed by an incumbency-based assessment of service length.
Eligible employees must attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to their post category
and submit the filled application form along with all supporting documents for verification.
the length of last uninterrupted service of the employee in the same post under the society is taken into account
along with the previous posting station and present place of posting. Candidates with the highest incumbency are selected and posted against the available vacancies.
how_to_apply: Applications are accepted only in offline mode through the Walk-in process; there is no online application facility for this In-House Selection.
Download the application form from www.kalahandi.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the form completely and paste a recent colour passport-size photograph at the designated space.

Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents, including the NOC cum Continuation Certificate, last contract renewal order, identity proof, educational certificates, and caste certificate.
Sign the declaration provided in the application form.
Attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to the post applied for, at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi, between 10:00 AM and 12:00 Noon.
Submit the filled application along with attachments for on-the-spot verification; late submissions will not be entertained.

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Visit Official Website for Notification & Application Form

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: This In-House Selection is meant exclusively for serving NHM employees of the OSH & FW Society who wish to be posted in Kalahandi District against existing vacancies in their own post. There is no online application; candidates must apply through the Walk-in mode only.

rows.office_of_the_chief_district_medical_pub: In-House Selection (for existing NHM/OSH & FW Society employees only)
Various Posts (Paediatric Specialist DEIC, M.O. MBBS, AYUSH M.O., Pharmacist RBSK, RMNCH/FP Counsellor, Physiotherapist, ANM and more)
63 Posts across 17 categories (provisional; may increase or decrease)
Temporary, Contractual (11 months, extendable), Co-terminus with the scheme
Document Verification and Incumbency-based (No Written Examination)
Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Walk-in Schedule
content_sections.text: The Walk-in for application submission and document verification is spread across three dates based on post category. Candidates must report only on the date assigned to their specific post and within the registration window, as no candidate will be entertained after the scheduled date and time.

rows.event: Walk-in for SL No. 1-4 (Paediatric Specialist DEIC, M.O. MBBS-DEIC, M.O. MBBS-NPCDCS, M.O. MBBS-SNCU)
Walk-in for SL No. 5-9 (AYUSH M.O. Co-located, AYUSH M.O. Female RBSK, AYUSH M.O. Male RBSK, Pharmacist RBSK, AYUSH M.O. MHU)

Walk-in for SL No. 10-17 (RMNCH/FP Counsellor, Counsellor Mobile Blood Collection Van, Physiotherapist IPU, Sentinel Site Malaria Technician & Coordinator, ANM MHU, Dental Technician, Nutritionist cum Counsellor NRC, ANM-RBSK)

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 63 vacancies have been notified across 17 posts under various NHM programme units including DEIC, NPCDCS, SNCU, RBSK, MHU, NRC and IPU. Some posts carry category-specific vacancies (SC/ST) as indicated in the table below.

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: This selection is open only to candidates already serving under National Health Mission in the OSH & FW Society, not to fresh or external applicants. Eligibility is determined based on current employment status, valid contract, and documentary proof of uninterrupted service.

rows.details: Candidate must be presently working under NHM (OSH & FW Society) in the same post for which applying, in a district other than Kalahandi.
Mandatory document from the competent authority confirming last uninterrupted service in the same post under the society; candidates without this certificate will not be eligible.
Candidate must hold a valid, current contract period; a copy of the last contract renewal order must be attached.
Candidate must not have been previously disengaged from ZSS/OSH & FW Society service on administrative grounds such as disobedience, poor performance, misbehaviour, or criminal activities.
To be furnished in the application form (SC/ST/SEBC/UR and district of domicile) as applicable.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of all the documents listed below along with the duly filled application form. Incomplete applications or missing documents will lead to summary rejection. One recent passport-size colour photograph, duly pasted at the designated space on the form. Self-attested photocopy of Identity Proof (Voter ID Card / PAN Card / Driving License / Aadhar Card / Passport). Self-attested copies of all mark sheets and certificates in proof of the educational qualification claimed. Self-attested copy of HSC or equivalent mark sheet and certificate (proof of age). Self-attested copy of all educational certificates. NOC and Continuation Certificate from the concerned CDM & PHO. Last contract renewal order. Self-attested copy of Caste Certificate issued by the competent authority.

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Application Form Details
content_sections.text: The In-House Selection application form requires personal, academic, and service-related details, along with a signed declaration. Candidates are advised to prepare the following information in advance to avoid delays at the Walk-in.

rows.details_to_be_furnished: Advertisement number and name of the post applied for, with photograph affixed.
Name, Father’s Name, Date of Birth, District of Domicile, Gender, Marital Status.
Category (SC/ST/SEBC/UR) and details of Person with Disability, Ex-servicemen, or Sportsperson status, if applicable.
Present and permanent address, telephone/mobile number, and email address (mandatory).
Exam passed, name of Board/University, year of passing, marks secured, percentage, and duration of course, starting from High School onward.

Present place of posting (NOC cum Continuation Certificate to be attached), date of joining (offer letter to be attached), valid contract period (renewal order to be attached), and number of years served in the same post.
Signed declaration confirming that the furnished information is true and that the candidate has not previously been disengaged from ZSS/OSH & FW Society service on administrative grounds.

content_sections.heading: Nature of Engagement and Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: The posts notified under this In-House Selection are temporary and tied to the duration of the scheme, not regular government positions. Candidates should review the engagement conditions carefully before applying. Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the scheme. All positions are contractual in nature for a period of 11 months , which may be extended based on performance assessment. Canvassing in any form will render the candidate disqualified for the position. Selection will be made as per Order No. 3418, dated 13-03-2028, of the Mission Directorate, NHM, Odisha.

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Unlike open recruitment, this In-House Selection does not involve a written examination. Selection is based on Walk-in document verification followed by an incumbency-based assessment of service length. Stage 1 – Walk-in Application & Document Verification Eligible employees must attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to their post category, at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi, between 10:00 AM and 12:00 Noon, and submit the filled application form along with all supporting documents for verification. Stage 2 – Incumbency Assessment & Selection For calculation of incumbency, the length of last uninterrupted service of the employee in the same post under the society is taken into account, along with the previous posting station and present place of posting. Candidates with the highest incumbency are selected and posted against the available vacancies.

content_sections.heading: Who Should NOT Apply for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates who are not currently employed under NHM in the OSH & FW Society – this selection is not open to fresh or external candidates. Candidates who do not possess a valid NOC cum Continuation Certificate from the competent authority. Candidates who do not hold a current, valid contract period or cannot produce the last contract renewal order. Candidates who have previously been disengaged from ZSS/OSH & FW Society service on administrative grounds such as disobedience, poor performance, misbehaviour, or criminal activities. Candidates who provide incomplete, incorrect, or unverifiable information in the application form. Candidates who cannot attend the Walk-in on the scheduled date and time assigned to their post.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying
content_sections.text: Not downloading the prescribed application form from www.kalahandi.odisha.gov.in before the Walk-in. Missing or not attaching the NOC cum Continuation Certificate – this makes the application ineligible. Failing to attach the last contract renewal order along with the application. Submitting incomplete application or documents, which will lead to rejection. Reporting on the wrong date or arriving late – no candidate will be entertained after the scheduled date and time. Leaving the email address field blank, even though it is mandatory in the form. Mismatch in personal details compared to HSC or other educational certificates.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026
content_sections.text: Applications are accepted only in offline mode through the Walk-in process; there is no online application facility for this In-House Selection. Download the application form from www.kalahandi.odisha.gov.in . Fill the form completely and paste a recent colour passport-size photograph at the designated space. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents, including the NOC cum Continuation Certificate, last contract renewal order, identity proof, educational certificates, and caste certificate. Sign the declaration provided in the application form. Attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to the post applied for, at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi, between 10:00 AM and 12:00 Noon. Submit the filled application along with attachments for on-the-spot verification; late submissions will not be entertained.

content_sections.heading: NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026 - Important Links
content_sections.text: Application Form & Notification: Click here Official Website: Click here

faq.question: Q1. Who can apply for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Only NHM employees of the OSH & FW Society who are currently working in the same post in a district other than Kalahandi and wish to be posted in Kalahandi can apply.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are notified under NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 63 vacancies across 17 posts have been notified, including Paediatric Specialist, M.O. MBBS, AYUSH M.O., Pharmacist, Counsellor, Physiotherapist, and ANM positions; the number is provisional and may change.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted only in offline mode through Walk-in; there is no online application portal for this selection.

faq.question: Q4. What is the Walk-in schedule for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Walk-in is held on 14-07-2026 for SL No. 1-4, on 15-07-2026 for SL No. 5-9, and on 17-07-2026 for SL No. 10-17, with registration from 10:00 AM to 12:00 Noon each day.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the Walk-in venue for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in is held at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Key documents include the NOC cum Continuation Certificate, last contract renewal order, identity proof, educational certificates, HSC certificate, caste certificate, and a passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the posts under NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: The posts are temporary, contractual, and co-terminus with the scheme, with an engagement period of 11 months that may be extended based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. How will selection be made for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on document verification at the Walk-in and incumbency, meaning candidates with the highest length of uninterrupted service in the same post are given preference; there is no written examination.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this In-House Selection.

faq.question: Q10. What happens if a candidate misses the scheduled Walk-in date for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: No candidate will be entertained after the scheduled Walk-in date and time, as per the official notification.
